title: Mint Tweaks
description: a heavily-tweaked & optimized QOL focused modpack intended for ease of use for my friends
body:
## Personal mod pack uploaded for ease of use for my friends <3 Intended for a heavily-tweaked quality-of-life focused SMP experience.

### dc : @mntchocoluvr

## Key Changes : 
- Typical Optimization Mods (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, etc.)
- QOL Mods & Changes (Carpet, Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, Litematica, Inventory Profiles Next, etc.)
  Personally predefined mapping prepackaged into the pack. ^^
- Visual Improvements (Iris, Wavy Capes, Visuality, etc.)
- Optifine Feature Alternatives (ETF, EMF, ~~CIT~~ (not updated yet), Dynamic Lights)
- Simple Voice Chat

## Known Issues :
- Syncmatica for litematica not properly working, atleast in our server ?
